sglang.title: fix: creat new dict everytime for putting new frame
sglang.author: Luodian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
This change fixes a severe bug where all video frames were being encoded
as the last frame due to dictionary reuse. It will put last frame 32 times into the messages due to the python's object reference logic.
By creating the frame_format dictionary inside the loop, we ensure each frame is uniquely

sglang.title: Fix padding in the cuda graph
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: FlashInfer requires seq_len to be 0 during cuda graph capture. Otherwise, it will raise illegal memory access sometimes.

sglang.bodyExcerpt: Fix environment variables which can lead to OOM issues

vllm.title: [Misc] guard against change in cuda library name
vllm.author: bnellnm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
It seems that newer versions of pytorch have renamed the CUDA_CUDA_LIB variable to CUDA_CUDA_LIBRARY.  I've changed the utils cmake to use CUDA_CUDA_LIBRARY if CUDA_CUDA_LIB is empty.
Along with the flash attention cmake changes, this will allow us to compile with pytorch nightly.
We also don't need

vllm.author: garg-amit
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR addresses the LoRA inferences bug for Phi3.5 mini and MoE. I’ve created a new model class for Phi3 to accommodate any further custom changes.

vllm.title: [Core] Support Lora lineage and base model metadata management
vllm.author: Jeffwan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Address #6275 #6274

Leverage root and parent field in the ModelCard to demonstrate the lora adapter lineage. Lora command supports json format and user can specify the base model explicitly.
Introduce BaseModelPath and use base mode info instead of served_model_names.
